mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, summary, content, content_html, cover_image, category_id, `type`, format, `status`, visibility, is_top, is_recommend, is_original, is_commentable, view_count, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, share_count, word_count, reading_time, last_comment_time, published_at, created_at, updated_at

insert into article
user_id,
title,
summary,
content,
content_html,
cover_image,
category_id,
`type`,
format,
`status`,
visibility,
is_top,
is_recommend,

like_count,
comment_count,
collect_count,
share_count,
word_count,
reading_time,
last_comment_time,
published_at,
created_at,
updated_at,

mapper.update:
update article
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
summary = #{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content_html = #{contentHtml,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover_image = #{coverImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
format = #{format,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
visibility = #{visibility,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_recommend = #{isRecommend,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_original = #{isOriginal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_commentable = #{isCommentable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
view_count = #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
like_count = #{likeCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comment_count = #{commentCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
collect_count = #{collectCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
share_count = #{shareCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
word_count = #{wordCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reading_time = #{readingTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_comment_time = #{lastCommentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
published_at = #{publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update article set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, summary = #{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content_html = #{contentHtml,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cover_image = #{coverImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, format = #{format,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visibility = #{visibility,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_recommend = #{isRecommend,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_original = #{isOriginal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_commentable = #{isCommentable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, view_count = #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, like_count = #{likeCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, comment_count = #{commentCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, collect_count = #{collectCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, share_count = #{shareCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, word_count = #{wordCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reading_time = #{readingTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_comment_time = #{lastCommentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, published_at = #{publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
